message:
fix(tools): replace unbounded file read with size-limited read in EditTool

Replace `asupersync::fs::read()` (which reads entire file into memory)
with a bounded read using `.take(READ_TOOL_MAX_BYTES + 1)` to prevent
OOM if file metadata was stale or the file grows between stat and read.

The new flow:
1. Open the file handle
2. Wrap it in a `.take()` limiter capped at READ_TOOL_MAX_BYTES + 1
3. Read to end (at most limit+1 bytes)
4. If more than READ_TOOL_MAX_BYTES were read, return a clear error
   instead of silently consuming excessive memory

This hardens the EditTool against adversarial or unexpectedly large
files without changing behavior for normal-sized files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
